name: io.github.agentphone-ai/agentphone
title: AgentPhone
description: Give AI agents real phone numbers, messages, and voice calls via MCP.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token for AgentPhone API authentication (format: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY). Get your key at https://agentphone.to

environmentVariables.name: AGENTPHONE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your AgentPhone API key. Get one at https://agentphone.to
